blended.narrative: Mount Washington is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 900 ft. Looking ahead, 21 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 6" of snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
